question.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trajectory.tracking;
SELECT title FROM imdb.movies ORDER BY year ASC LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT movieid FROM imdb.movies2directors GROUP BY movieid HAVING COUNT(directorid) > 7 ) sub;
SELECT m.year FROM imdb.movies m JOIN imdb.movies2directors md ON m.movieid = md.movieid GROUP BY m.movieid, m.year ORDER BY COUNT(md.directorid) DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT ma2.actorid FROM imdb.actors a JOIN imdb.movies2actors ma1 ON a.actorid = ma1.actorid JOIN imdb.movies2actors ma2 ON ma1.movieid = ma2.movieid WHERE a.name = 'Hanks, Tom' AND ma2.actorid != ma1.actorid GROUP BY ma2.actorid ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

WITH pairs AS ( SELECT ma1.actorid AS actor_a, ma2.actorid AS actor_b FROM imdb.movies2actors ma1 JOIN imdb.movies2actors ma2 ON ma1.movieid = ma2.movieid AND ma1.actorid < ma2.actorid GROUP BY ma1.actorid, ma2.actorid HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ) SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT actorid) FROM ( SELECT actor_a AS actorid FROM pairs UNION SELECT actor_b AS actorid FROM pairs ) all_actors;
SELECT (m.year / 10) * 10 AS decade FROM imdb.movies m JOIN imdb.ratings r ON m.movieid = r.movieid GROUP BY decade ORDER BY AVG(NULLIF(r.rank, '')::numeric) DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.movieid) FROM imdb.movies m LEFT JOIN imdb.movies2directors md ON m.movieid = md.movieid WHERE NULLIF(md.genre, '') IS NULL;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.movieid) FROM imdb.movies m JOIN imdb.movies2directors md ON m.movieid = md.movieid JOIN imdb.directors d ON md.directorid = d.directorid JOIN imdb.movies2writers mw ON m.movieid = mw.movieid JOIN imdb.writers w ON mw.writerid = w.writerid AND w.name = d.name JOIN imdb.actors a ON a.name = d.name WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM imdb.movies2actors ma JOIN imdb.actors act ON ma.actorid = act.actorid WHERE ma.movieid = m.movieid AND act.name = d.name );

SELECT md.directorid FROM imdb.movies2directors md JOIN imdb.runningtimes rt ON md.movieid = rt.movieid WHERE CASE WHEN rt.time ~ '^\d+:\d+$' THEN SPLIT_PART(rt.time, ':', 1)::numeric * 60 + SPLIT_PART(rt.time, ':', 2)::numeric WHEN rt.time ~ ':' THEN NULLIF(REGEXP_REPLACE(rt.time, '^.*:', ''), '')::numeric ELSE NULLIF(rt.time, '')::numeric END > 160 GROUP BY md.directorid ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT md.movieid) DESC LIMIT 1;

WITH spielberg_actors AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ma.actorid FROM imdb.movies2actors ma JOIN imdb.movies2directors md ON ma.movieid = md.movieid JOIN imdb.directors d ON md.directorid = d.directorid WHERE d.name = 'Spielberg, Steven' ), prolific AS ( SELECT ma.actorid FROM imdb.movies2actors ma JOIN imdb.movies m ON ma.movieid = m.movieid WHERE m.year < 2015 GROUP BY ma.actorid HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ma.movieid) > 43 ) SELECT p.actorid FROM prolific p JOIN spielberg_actors sa ON p.actorid = sa.actorid;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scenicornot.locations WHERE ST_DWithin( geom_bng, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(326623, 523330), 27700), 5000 );
SELECT h.cell_id FROM scenicornot.hexgrid10km h JOIN scenicornot.locations l ON ST_Within(l.geom_bng, h.geom) GROUP BY h.cell_id HAVING COUNT(l.fid) >= 3 ORDER BY AVG(l.average) DESC LIMIT 1;

WITH cell_avg AS ( SELECT h.cell_id, AVG(l.average) AS avg_score FROM scenicornot.hexgrid10km h JOIN scenicornot.locations l ON ST_Within(l.geom_bng, h.geom) GROUP BY h.cell_id ) SELECT a.cell_id, b.cell_id FROM cell_avg a JOIN cell_avg b ON a.cell_id < b.cell_id JOIN scenicornot.hexgrid10km ha ON a.cell_id = ha.cell_id JOIN scenicornot.hexgrid10km hb ON b.cell_id = hb.cell_id WHERE ST_Touches(ha.geom, hb.geom) ORDER BY ABS(a.avg_score - b.avg_score) DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT '2011-05-01 00:00:00'::timestamp + (FLOOR( EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (datetime - '2011-05-01 00:00:00'::timestamp)) / (48 * 3600) ) * 48 * 3600 || ' seconds')::interval AS period_start FROM quakes.scotquakes WHERE datetime >= '2011-05-01 00:00:00' GROUP BY period_start ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT l.fid) FROM scenicornot.locations l JOIN quakes.scotquakes q ON ST_DWithin(l.geom_bng, ST_Transform(q.geom, 27700), 100);
SELECT AVG(spd) FROM trajectory.tracking WHERE userid = 'p3' AND spd > 0;
SELECT userid FROM trajectory.tracking GROUP BY userid, routeid ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

WITH trajectories AS ( SELECT userid, routeid, ST_MakeLine(geom ORDER BY datetime) AS line FROM trajectory.tracking GROUP BY userid, routeid ) SELECT userid FROM trajectories WHERE ST_Distance( ST_StartPoint(line)::geography, ST_EndPoint(line)::geography ) > 0 ORDER BY ( ST_Length(line::geography) / ST_Distance( ST_StartPoint(line)::geography, ST_EndPoint(line)::geography ) ) DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date_taken)::integer AS month FROM flickr.flickr_edin GROUP BY month ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT userid FROM flickr.flickr_edin GROUP BY userid ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT FLOOR(ST_X(geom) / 100)::bigint::text || ',' || FLOOR(ST_Y(geom) / 100)::bigint::text ) DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT osm_name FROM accident.network WHERE LOWER(osm_name) LIKE '%avenue%' GROUP BY osm_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT osm_id) > 1 ) sub;

WITH route_lengths AS ( SELECT 'a' AS route, ST_Length(ST_Union(geom)) / 1000 AS length_km FROM accident.route_a UNION ALL SELECT 'b' AS route, ST_Length(ST_Union(geom)) / 1000 AS length_km FROM accident.route_b UNION ALL SELECT 'c' AS route, ST_Length(ST_Union(geom)) / 1000 AS length_km FROM accident.route_c ), route_crashes AS ( SELECT 'a' AS route, COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS crashes FROM accident.route_a r JOIN accident.edincrash e ON ST_DWithin(r.geom, e.geom, 15) UNION ALL SELECT 'b' AS route, COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS crashes FROM accident.route_b r JOIN accident.edincrash e ON ST_DWithin(r.geom, e.geom, 15) UNION ALL SELECT 'c' AS route, COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS crashes FROM accident.route_c r JOIN accident.edincrash e ON ST_DWithin(r.geom, e.geom, 15) ) SELECT rc.route FROM route_crashes rc JOIN route_lengths rl ON rc.route = rl.route ORDER BY (rc.crashes / rl.length_km) DESC LIMIT 1;
